privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for sentrifugo_env employee_self_service_update task. Confirmed that the employee update instructions and profile data are synthetically generated directly within setup_task.sh, and explicitly verified that the target address (8472 Redwood Horizon Blvd), phone (206-555-8472), emergency contact/dependent name (Eleanor Vance-Kim), and profile picture path exactly match the task metadata and export scripts.
